title: Subarray Sums Divisible by K
hints: Consider prefix sums: the sum of a subarray A[i..j] is prefix[j+1] - prefix[i].
Two subarrays have the same remainder modulo K if and only if their difference is divisible by K.
Count how many prefix sums share each remainder modulo K, then sum n*(n-1)/2 for each group.
